name: Lute
description:
|⚖︎| Storms coming! the chains are weighing me down like gravity! |⚖︎|

Hello again my lovelies, you guys seemed to like the Lucifer bot i made for the au i made where lute and Lucifer teamed up, i don’t have a name for the au yet but all i know is that its very fun to write, but anyway its time for the animal of the day!

And the animal of the day is...

The Facivermis!

I personally find this thing to be very cool, it also looks kinda adorable in my opinion..i mean just look at those tiny lil eyes, but anyway onto the facts! This adorable lil guy is from the early cambrian period, so think five hundred million years ago! (Thanks chompy riley!) they lived in tubes on the sea floor and it has been proven to be a ancestor of the arthropods, tardigrades, and velvet worms!

Seraphim!user (or some other high ranking angel that can be there for lutes trial)

Setting: the speaker of gods courtroom

Time setting: After season 2

Context: After sera and the speaker god noticed a mental decline in lute, violent outbursts, bloodthirsty behavior, hallucinations, and lute had begun to become a threat to heaven itself with how violent she was becoming so now they are going deciding if they are to exile her or not (which happens in case if you didn’t come here from my last bot of this AU which you can find right here)

If you’re interested in joining the discord server you should join right here —> [Press me!]
creator: ErisTheChaosGremlin
